revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}||1}}<!-- if volcano number or no name, produce citation: -->|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web archived |_exclude=vnum,vn,id,vtab |_alias-map=2:title,3:access-date,4:date,name:title,entrydate:date,entry-date:date |url={{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}|https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn={{if empty|{{{1|}}}|{{{vn|}}}|{{{id|}}}|{{{vnum|}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{vtab|}}}|&vtab={{{vtab}}}}}<!-- -->|https://volcano.si.edu/}}<!-- if no number given, use main page --> |title=Global Volcanism Program |work={{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}|[[Global Volcanism Program]]}} |publisher=[[Smithsonian Institution]]}}<!-- if name and no volcano number, produce error: -->|{{citation error|no volcano number specified|cite gvp|nocat={{main other||true}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}||1}}<!-- if volcano number or no name, produce citation: -->|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web archived |_exclude=vnum,vn,id,vtab |_alias-map=2:title,3:access-date,4:date,name:title,entrydate:date,entry-date:date |url={{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}|https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn={{if empty|{{{1|}}}|{{{vn|}}}|{{{id|}}}|{{{vnum|}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{vtab|}}}|&vtab={{{vtab}}}}}<!-- -->|https://volcano.si.edu/}}<!-- if no number given, use main page --> |title=Global Volcanism Program |work={{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}|[[Global Volcanism Program]]}} |publisher=[[Smithsonian Institution]]}}<!-- if name and no volcano number, produce error: -->|{{citation error|no volcano number specified|cite gvp|nocat={{main other||true}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}||1}}<!-- if volcano number or no name, produce citation: -->|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web archived |_exclude=vnum,vn,id,vtab |_alias-map=2:title,3:access-date,4:date,name:title,entrydate:date,entry-date:date |url={{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}|https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn={{if empty|{{{1|}}}|{{{vn|}}}|{{{id|}}}|{{{vnum|}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{vtab|}}}|&vtab={{{vtab}}}}}<!-- -->|https://volcano.si.edu/}}<!-- if no number given, use main page --> |title=Global Volcanism Program |work={{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}|[[Global Volcanism Program]]}} |publisher=[[Smithsonian Institution]]}}<!-- if name and no volcano number, produce error: -->|{{citation error|no volcano number specified|cite gvp|nocat={{main other||true}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}||1}}<!-- if volcano number or no name, produce citation: -->|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web archived |_exclude=vnum,vn,id,vtab |_alias-map=2:title,3:access-date,4:date,name:title,entrydate:date,entry-date:date |url={{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}|https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn={{if empty|{{{1|}}}|{{{vn|}}}|{{{id|}}}|{{{vnum|}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{vtab|}}}|&vtab={{{vtab}}}}}<!-- -->|https://volcano.si.edu/}}<!-- if no number given, use main page --> |title=Global Volcanism Program |work={{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}|[[Global Volcanism Program]]}} |publisher=[[Smithsonian Institution]]}}<!-- if name and no volcano number, produce error: -->|{{citation error|no volcano number specified|cite gvp|nocat={{main other||true}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_gvp here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_gvp for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}||1}}<!-- if volcano number or no name, produce citation: -->|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web archived |_exclude=vnum,vn,id,vtab |_alias-map=2:title,3:access-date,4:date,name:title,entrydate:date,entry-date:date |url={{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{vn|}}}{{{vnum|}}}{{{id|}}}|https://volcano.si.edu/volcano.cfm?vn={{if empty|{{{1|}}}|{{{vn|}}}|{{{id|}}}|{{{vnum|}}}}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{vtab|}}}|&vtab={{{vtab}}}}}<!-- -->|https://volcano.si.edu/}}<!-- if no number given, use main page --> |title=Global Volcanism Program |work={{#if:{{{name|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{2|}}}|[[Global Volcanism Program]]}} |publisher=[[Smithsonian Institution]]}}<!-- if name and no volcano number, produce error: -->|{{citation error|no volcano number specified|cite gvp|nocat={{main other||true}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
